result.summary: Standvirtual exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://www.standvirtual.com/mcp` with no auth, plus publicly accessible HTTP listing/search pages on `https://www.api.standvirtual.com`; no documented developer REST/GraphQL APIs or CLI were found.
result.description: Standvirtual is a Portuguese online marketplace for buying and selling vehicles, including cars, motorcycles, commercial vehicles, boats, motorhomes, heavy vehicles, and parts. It provides public listing and search pages for vehicle classifieds and tools for private and professional sellers.

surfaces.name: Standvirtual Public Listings Web HTTP Surface
surfaces.notes: Public web endpoints on `www.api.standvirtual.com` render listing and search pages without authentication. No machine-readable API spec or developer documentation was found, so this is recorded as a public HTTP surface only at the observed host level.
